method.hdf: ObsPy StationXML response removal to native input units (Pa), pre-filter 0.05/0.1/45/49 Hz, 60 dB water level, per-minute demeaned RMS. No interpolation.
method.ehz: ObsPy StationXML response removal to ground velocity (m/s), same pre-filter and water level, per-minute demeaned RMS.
method.warning: Instrument measurements alone cannot identify a source, intent, exposure, health effect, building condition, or legal cause.
